summary: Video. A Fox News 'Breaking News' clip shows border czar Tom Homan at a Minneapolis press conference podium, saying that sanctuary fears are unfounded and that ICE wants to talk to criminals in custody, not crime victims. It is cable news press conference footage with a news chyron and no music or added editing effects.
notable_text: MINNEAPOLIS LIVE; BREAKING NEWS; NOW: BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN HOLDS PRESS CONFERENCE; FOX NEWS ALERT
